title: BEM-863 extract latest changes
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 12:40 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
def read(p):
    p=Path(p)
    return p.read_text(errors='ignore') if p.exists() else ''
b861=load('governance/state/bem861_broaden_reapproval_response_filter.json')
latest=(b861.get('latest_real_response') or [])[-1:] if b861.get('latest_real_response') else []
text=latest[0].get('preview','') if latest else ''
# If preview is too short, load full file.
if latest and latest[0].get('path'):
    text=read(latest[0].get('path')) or text
lines=[x.strip() for x in text.splitlines() if x.strip()]
changes=[]
for line in lines:
    low=line.lower()
    if any(k in low for k in ['change_required','blocked','required','must','missing','should','need','recommend','cannot','треб', 'нужно', 'долж', 'не хватает']):
        changes.append(line[:700])
status='latest_changes_extracted' if changes else 'latest_changes_not_extracted'
next_action='patch protocol using latest response changes' if changes else 'force Claude to return concrete patchable changes; current response lacks actionable lines'
state={'bem':'BEM-863','status':status,'source_response':latest[0].get('path') if latest else None,'decision':b861.get('decision'),'changes':changes[:80],'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem863_extract_latest_response_changes.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem863_extract_latest_response_changes.md').write_text('# BEM-863 | Extract Latest Response Changes | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem863_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-863'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/bem863_extract_latest_response_changes.json','governance/reports/bem863_extract_latest_response_changes.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem863_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Extracted actionable change/blocker lines from the latest broad-filter real Claude response')
"""
No issue comments.
